MedlinePlus Connect: Email List 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/medlineplus-connect/email-list/ 
MedlinePlus Connect: Email List 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
MedlinePlus Connect is a free service of the National Library of Medicine (NLM), National Institutes of Health (NIH), and the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS). This service allows health organizations or health IT providers to link patient portals or electronic health record (EHR) systems to MedlinePlus, an authoritative up-to-date health in
